assertions.description: PaymentRequest constructor is exposed on the global window.
PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities is exposed as a static function.

assertions.test: (()=>{ try { const p = PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities(); return p instanceof Promise; } catch(e) { return false; } })()

assertions.description: PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities() resolves to an object with a boolean paymentCredentials property.
assertions.test: (async ()=>{ try { const caps = await PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities(); return typeof caps === 'object' && 'paymentCredentials' in caps; } catch(e) { return false; } })()
